name: OTIC CAPSULE DYSPLASIA
definition: cochlear cavity malformation saccular defect / cavity in otic capsule in the position normally occupied by cochlea cystic cochleovestibular malformation complete lack of partitioning of cochlea classic Mondini malformation normal basilar turn + varying degrees of hypoplasia of middle and apical turns Michel aplasia = Michel anomaly = agenesis of osseous + membranous labyrinth (rare) decrease in the diameter of IAC ← hypoplasia / aplasia of cochlear nerve (portion of ENLARGED VESTIBULAR AQUEDUCT SYNDROME

demographics.Frequency: 2nd most common imaging finding in children with sensorineural hearing loss

discriminating_features: CLASSIC funnel-shaped deformity of dilated vestibular aqueduct ← enlarged

vestibule extends further into lateral + superior aspects of otic capsule
